setup: Pick a small rolldown/rolldown PR that touches one subsystem and contains (or is seeded with) one correctness defect the grader knows about. Substitute its number for <N>. A merged PR re-reviewed at its pre-merge head works.
query: Review rolldown/rolldown PR #<N> and prepare the appropriate GitHub review. Do not post anything without my confirmation.
expected_behavior: Resolves the base branch, merge base, exact head SHA, and three-dot diff before reading the implementation
Writes an independent model of the problem (success conditions, invariants, from-scratch solution shape) before inspecting the patch
Reads references/rolldown-repo.md before running any build or test command, and runs focused tests before broad suites
Classifies the PR as simple and dispatches exactly one fresh subagent whose prompt contains no primary findings, suspected bugs, or intended verdict
Reports the known defect as a Blocker with a runnable reproduction or strong static proof, placed on the causal changed line with the required prefix format
Prepares Request changes per the Verdict rule and performs no GitHub mutation without explicit confirmation
